## Checklist

- [ ] I've tested this locally end-to-end
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`pnpm tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in — using `logger` (backend) or `toast` (frontend)
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] Dark mode tested (frontend changes)
- [ ] New endpoints have `verifyJWT` + Zod validation (backend changes)
